question: Which year from 2011-2015 has the lowest birth rate for unmarried females ages 15-19 in the United States? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A social scientist is tracking the decline in unmarried teen birth rates over the early 2010s.

1.fact: Filtering to Age Group = "15-19 years" and Race or Hispanic Origin = "All Races" for 2011-2015, the minimum Birth Rate is 20.2 in 2015.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2015 has the lowest birth rate for unmarried females ages 15-19 in the United States? (Filter Age Group == "15-19 years" and Race or Hispanic Origin == "All Races"; select the minimum Birth Rate.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2015 has the lowest birth rate for unmarried females ages 15-19? (Filter Age Group == "15-19 years" and Race or Hispanic Origin == "All Races"; select the minimum Birth Rate.) The answer is 2015.
